model.prompt: Generate a creative band name for a {{genre}} band. Return ONLY the name, nothing else.
Write a short, catchy slogan for the band '{{band_name}}'.
Act as a harsh music critic. Judge the potential of the band '{{band_name}}' with the slogan '{{slogan}}'. Write a short review.

judge.prompt: You are selecting the best music review. Choose the review that is the most entertaining, insightful, and well-written. Prefer reviews with sharp wit and specific criticisms over generic dismissals.
